data.name: Error_AccountLocked
data.value: This account has been locked. Please try again later.

data.name: Error_AccountInactive
data.value: This account is inactive. Please contact an administrator.

data.name: Error_SessionExpired
data.value: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

data.name: Error_SsoFailed
data.value: Single sign-on failed. Please try again.

data.name: TwoFactor_RecoverySubtitle
data.value: Enter one of your recovery codes to sign in.

data.name: TwoFactor_AuthSubtitle
data.value: Open your authenticator app and enter the current code.

data.name: TwoFactor_CancelReturn
data.value: Cancel and return to sign in

data.name: TwoFactorSetup_SaveWarning
data.value: Save these recovery codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once. If you lose access to your authenticator app, these are the only way to sign in.

data.name: TwoFactorSetup_ScanDesc
data.value: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.), then enter the 6-digit code to confirm setup.

data.name: TwoFactorSetup_CantScan
data.value: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:

data.name: TwoFactorSetup_CodeHelper
data.value: Enter the code shown in your authenticator app.

data.name: TwoFactorSetup_Intro
data.value: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account. After entering your password, you'll also need to provide a code from your authenticator app.

data.name: TwoFactorSetup_Step_Install
data.value: Install an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, etc.)

data.name: TwoFactorSetup_Step_Scan
data.value: Scan a QR code to link your account

data.name: TwoFactorSetup_Step_Code
data.value: Enter the 6-digit code on sign in

data.name: Setup_Subtitle
data.value: Create your administrator account to get started.

data.name: Apps_NoAppsDesc
data.value: No applications have been configured or you don't have access to any.

data.name: Profile_TwoFactorActive
data.value: Two-factor authentication is active. Recovery codes remaining: {0}

data.name: Profile_TwoFactorInactive
data.value: Add an extra layer of security by requiring a code from your authenticator app at sign in.

data.name: Profile_NoProviders
data.value: No external sign-in providers are configured.

data.name: Profile_AllSessionsRevoked
data.value: All sessions revoked. You will be signed out shortly.

data.name: Admin_Settings_DefaultLanguage_Helper
data.value: Applied to users who have not set a language preference.

data.name: Admin_Settings_BrandingTitle_Helper
data.value: Shown on login and registration pages.

data.name: Admin_Settings_UseEmailAsUsername_Desc
data.value: Hide the username field and use email for login.

data.name: Admin_Settings_AllowEmailLogin_Desc
data.value: Allow users to log in with either their username or email address.

data.name: Admin_Settings_ClientSecret_Helper
data.value: Leave blank to keep existing secret.

data.name: Admin_IdP_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete '{0}'? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Admin_IdP_MapperNameRequired
data.value: Name and all required fields must be filled in.

data.name: Admin_IdP_SyncMode_Inherit
data.value: Inherit — use the provider's sync mode

data.name: Admin_IdP_Alias_Helper
data.value: Used in the callback path: /signin-{alias}. Cannot be changed after creation.

data.name: Admin_IdP_Scopes_Helper
data.value: Space-separated OAuth2 scopes. Defaults to 'openid' if blank.

data.name: Admin_IdP_SyncMode_Import
data.value: Import — sync user data on first login only

data.name: Admin_IdP_SyncMode_Update
data.value: Update — sync user data on every login

data.name: Admin_IdP_AccountLinkingOnly
data.value: Account Linking Only — users cannot sign in through this provider, only link from their profile

data.name: Admin_IdP_HideOnLoginPage
data.value: Hide on Login Page — only accessible via ?idp_hint={alias}

data.name: Admin_Users_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete '{0}'? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Admin_UserDetail_RolesInherited
data.value: Roles are inherited from group membership.

data.name: Admin_UserProps_UseEmailAsUsername_Desc
data.value: When enabled, the username field is hidden and email is used as the unique login identifier.

data.name: Admin_UserProps_BuiltIn_Desc
data.value: Configure which attributes are collected and shown on user profiles.

data.name: Admin_UserAttrs_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Delete '{0}'? Existing user values for this attribute will also be deleted.

data.name: Admin_UserAttrs_NameAndTypeRequired
data.value: Name and input type are required.

data.name: Admin_ClientScopes_ConsentText_Helper
data.value: Shown on the consent screen. Defaults to the scope name if left blank.

data.name: Admin_ClientScopes_UserProperty_Helper
data.value: Name of a public property on the user account (e.g. EmailConfirmed).

data.name: Admin_ClientScopes_AcrHelper
data.value: This claim is computed automatically and doesn't require a source mapping.

data.name: Admin_ClientScopes_MapperNameAndAttributeRequired
data.value: Name and user attribute are required.

data.name: Admin_Groups_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Delete '{0}'? Members will lose any roles assigned via this group.

data.name: Admin_GroupDetail_RolesDesc
data.value: Roles assigned here are automatically granted to all group members.

data.name: Admin_Roles_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Delete '{0}'? This will remove the role from all groups that use it.

data.name: Admin_Apps_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete '{0}'? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Admin_AppDetail_LaunchUrl_Helper
data.value: URL users are directed to when launching.

data.name: Admin_AppDetail_LinkedClient_Helper
data.value: Associate this launcher with an OIDC client.

data.name: Admin_AppDetail_PublicAlert
data.value: This application is public — all users can see it. Disable public access to restrict by group or user.

data.name: Admin_Clients_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete '{0}'? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Admin_ClientDetail_TokenLifetimes_Helper
data.value: Leave blank to use the server defaults.

data.name: Admin_ClientDetail_Secrets_Desc
data.value: Secrets are used to authenticate confidential clients.

data.name: Admin_ClientDetail_DeleteSecretConfirm
data.value: Delete this secret? Any clients using it will immediately lose access.
